Language:

Identify the programming language of the following code snippet. Reply with only the language name, nothing else.

Code:
```
def quicksort(list)
  return list if list.length <= 1
  pivot = list.sample
  left, right = list.partition { |x| x < pivot }
  quicksort(left) + [pivot] + quicksort(right)
end
```

SELECT e.name, d.department_name

JOIN departments d ON e.dept_id = d.id
WHERE e.salary > 50000
ORDER BY e.name;

doc.snippet:
defmodule Math do
  def factorial(0), do: 1
  def factorial(n) when n > 0 do
    n * factorial(n - 1)
  end
end
